name: 接口开发工具
description: 按 URI 将接口定义同步到 dtool 接口开发模块；已有 URI 更新，不存在则创建。
tool_description: Synchronize API definitions to a dtool collection folder by URI. Existing URIs are updated and missing URIs are created. The target collection and folder must be explicitly identified before writing.

parameters.name: apis
parameters.description: 要同步的接口定义列表

parameters.name: create_folder
parameters.description: 文件夹不存在时是否创建，默认 false

parameters.name: base_url
parameters.description: dtool 服务地址，默认 http://localhost:17170
